model_specification_line: results = smf.wls("full_time ~ eligible + C(year) + C(statefip)", data=df, weights=df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": df["statefip"]})
sample_selection: hispan == 1, bpl == 200, citizen == 3 to isolate Mexican-born Hispanic noncitizens
birthyr between 1974 and 2000 with yrimmig between 1970 and 2016 and valid usual hours recorded
